penalties.description: Cannot determine completion as this appears to be a promotional video for the LapAR Pro system, not an actual task performance.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as promotional content for the LapAR Pro system rather than an actual FLS task performance. GPT-4o incorrectly scored what appears to be demonstration footage as a completed task. The video shows equipment setup and system demonstrations, not a scoreable Precision Cutting task with gauze material and marked circle cutting.

claude_value.description: Cannot determine completion as this appears to be a promotional video for the LapAR Pro system, not an actual task performance.

disagreements.rationale: Claude correctly identified this as promotional/demonstration content rather than an actual FLS task performance. GPT-4o appears to have misinterpreted demonstration footage as a completed task.
No actual task was performed, so completion time should be 0.0 seconds.
No actual task phases occurred in promotional content.
Promotional content cannot receive a task performance score.
